tweets.text: To update on this. ZSA discussion is still ongoing in the ZEC community, I am hopeful. I diversified ~10% of my Zcash position into Nock, Octra, Aztec, Umbra, Near, Starknet & Railgun. Still considering some other options and adding. All of these choices either complement ZEC's functionality, or have a decent chance of beating it to market adoption for some use cases. Will do a bigger writeup soon
tweets.quoted_tweet_text: I don't agree with this take, which appears to be the forming community consensus around Zcash ZSAs. It means I will be diversifying some zec into other privacy protocols that can support these operations. I don't think it's worth the infighting when one can just move capital.
